name: Shoofly Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Ensure the unbaked 9-inch pie crust is ready.
2. Mix together the first four ingredients in one bowl.
3. In another bowl, mix the next three ingredients with your hands.
4. Pour about 1/3 of the molasses mixture into the pie pan lined with pastry rolled to a thickness of 1/8 inch.
5. Sprinkle with 1/3 of the flour mixture.
6. Continue alternating layers until all ingredients are used, finishing with a layer of flour.
7. Bake in a preheated moderate oven (375°F) for 35 minutes.
8. Serve warm or cold.
